name: Dutch Apple Dessert
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups finely ground graham cracker crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumb crumbs and butter, pressing them into a 9 x 13 inch baking dish.
2. Stir together the milk, sour cream, and lemon juice, then spread over the crust.
3. Spoon on the apple pie filling. Add the nuts and cinnamon.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes. Serve warm or cold.
